name: MICROSOFT CORP
summary: Microsoft is a technology company founded in 1975 that develops and supports software, services, devices, and solutions. Key offerings include Microsoft 365, Windows, Azure cloud platform, LinkedIn, Dynamics 365, Xbox gaming, and AI-powered tools like Microsoft 365 Copilot. The company operates across three segments: Productivity and Business Processes, Intelligent Cloud, and More Personal Computing, serving individuals, businesses, and governments globally.

products.name: Microsoft 365 Commercial
products.description: AI-powered business productivity platform combining Office, Windows, Copilot, and Enterprise Mobility + Security for organizations.

products.name: Microsoft 365 Consumer
products.description: Personal productivity and creativity suite including Office apps, Outlook.com, and OneDrive storage services.

products.name: Microsoft Azure
products.description: Cloud computing platform offering infrastructure, developer tools, data, AI, and hybrid cloud services.

products.name: LinkedIn
products.description: Professional networking platform offering Talent Solutions, Marketing Solutions, Premium Subscriptions, and Sales Solutions.

products.name: Dynamics 365
products.description: Cloud-based intelligent business applications spanning ERP, CRM, Power Apps, and Power Automate.

products.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot
products.description: AI-powered productivity assistant integrated across Microsoft 365 applications for individuals and enterprises.

products.name: Windows
products.description: Operating system for PCs and devices, available in commercial and consumer editions, on-premises and cloud.

products.name: Xbox
products.description: Gaming and entertainment console platform including Xbox hardware, Game Pass subscription, and game content.

products.name: GitHub
products.description: Developer collaboration and code hosting platform with AI-powered tools including GitHub Copilot.

products.name: Microsoft Security
products.description: Integrated end-to-end security, compliance, identity, and management solutions across clouds and platforms.

products.name: Microsoft Edge
products.description: Web browser integrated with Bing search and AI-powered features.

products.name: Bing
products.description: Search engine providing online search and advertising services with AI-powered features.

products.name: Surface
products.description: Microsoft-designed PCs and tablets for consumers and businesses.

products.name: HoloLens
products.description: Mixed reality headset device for enterprise and development use cases.

products.name: Power BI
products.description: Cloud-based business analytics and data visualization tool.

products.name: Azure OpenAI Service
products.description: Cloud service providing access to OpenAI large language models integrated within Microsoft Azure.

products.name: Microsoft Teams
products.description: Collaboration and communication platform for chat, meetings, and file sharing across organizations.

products.name: OneDrive
products.description: Cloud storage service integrated with Microsoft 365 for individuals and businesses.

partnerships.description: Microsoft integrates OpenAI models into Azure OpenAI Service and across its product portfolio including Copilot.
Partnership supporting integration of Meta's Llama models within Microsoft's AI platform offerings.
OEM partners pre-install Windows and other Microsoft software on PCs and devices sold to consumers and businesses.
